title: クレーンゲーム大成功！

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
You're so cool, Trainer! You handled those
controls like a pro!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Did you train somewhere? What school did you
go to? What's your rank?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I can't wait until the day your skills and spirit pass
on to me!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I'll follow you forever, so please take me under
your wing! That's a super promise, okay?!
